examples: The foci found were in vermis (36) and cerebellar hemispheres (6).
Results: 8 cases located in cerebellar hemisphere, 5 cases in vermis, 10 cases in fourth ventricle.
MRI shows a cystic mass located in the vermis of the cerebellum that has a solid component on the right.
Pope Gelasius I compared the life of Christ to that of the caterpillar: Vermis quia resurrexit.
